definitions: 统治时期；在位期间（尤指君主、政权的统治）

examples.text: But in 1600, Tokugawa Ieyasu defeated his warlord rivals and unified Japan under his rule. This marked the beginning of the Tokugawa shogunate’s reign, which lasted from 1603 through 1867. During this time, Ieyasu and the shoguns who succeeded him
examples.explanation: 这里的 reign 指“统治时期、在位期间”。句中 the Tokugawa shogunate’s reign 表示“德川幕府的统治时期”，强调这一政权从 1603 年持续到 1867 年的统治阶段。

source.text: How Japan saved its biggest city from collapse - Roman Krznaric
